prompt: What is the form of Destructive Dilemma?
hint: 'Destructive' applies Modus Tollens to each conditional, so it negates the antecedents.
explanation: Destructive Dilemma: from two conditionals (P → Q) and (R → S) plus the negated-consequents disjunction (¬Q ∨ ¬S), conclude (¬P ∨ ¬R) — Modus Tollens applied across a disjunction. Option 1 is Constructive Dilemma, option 3 is Hypothetical Syllogism, option 4 is Simplification.
